nodes.label: TennisBot
nodes.description: Automated ATP match prediction and live Kalshi betting system

nodes.label: XGBoost
nodes.description: Gradient boosting using 21 static features for pre-game win probability

nodes.label: LSTM
nodes.description: Long short-term memory NN using last 10 matches to capture momentum

nodes.label: HybridModel
nodes.description: Blended 40% XGBoost / 60% LSTM into a single hybrid_prob

nodes.label: IsotonicCalibration
nodes.description: Isotonic regression calibration on model probability outputs

nodes.label: MarkovChain
nodes.description: Hierarchical Markov chain: point→game→set→match win probability

nodes.label: KellyCriterion
nodes.description: Fractional Kelly bet sizing tiered by model conviction (5%–40%)

nodes.label: LiveMatchState
nodes.description: Stateful object tracking match score and recomputing win probability each point

nodes.label: p_serve
nodes.description: P(Player A wins point on own serve) — base Markov input

nodes.label: p_return
nodes.description: P(Player A wins point when opponent serves) — base Markov input

nodes.label: hybrid_prob
nodes.description: Pre-game win probability for Player A blended from XGBoost and LSTM

nodes.label: edge_yes
nodes.description: Edge on YES side: hybrid_prob_A minus Kalshi YES price minus fee

nodes.label: KalshiMarket
nodes.description: Prediction market on Kalshi for a tennis H2H match

nodes.label: LiveScoreCDN
nodes.description: LiveScore CDN API for live match scores and daily schedule

nodes.label: JeffSackmannATP
nodes.description: 195,000+ ATP matches dataset (1968–2026)

nodes.label: HighFrequencyMode
nodes.description: HF mode: 0.3% edge, 5% Kelly, $15 cap, 0.8s poll; auto-reverts after $50 profit

nodes.label: WalkForwardBacktest
nodes.description: Walk-forward evaluation: trained on 1968–2021, tested on 2022–2026 (9,034 matches)

nodes.label: SlippageCap
nodes.description: price_cents ignored in buy/sell — was hardcoded to 99/1 (now fixed)

nodes.label: TieredScaleOut
nodes.description: Partial sells at 2×/3×/4× entry — double-sell bug on price oscillation (to fix)

nodes.label: KALSHI_FEE_RATE
nodes.description: Kalshi fee 7% of winning payout — now subtracted from edge calc

nodes.label: MODEL_REVERSAL_EXIT_EDGE
nodes.description: Reversal exit threshold — was firing at 0, now 1.5% (fixed)

nodes.label: FillCountParsing
nodes.description: taker_fill_count nested under resp['order'] — was accessed at top level (to fix)

nodes.label: YesSideMapping
nodes.description: YES token assumed = Player A without verification (to fix)

nodes.label: BettingROI
nodes.description: Backtest ROI: baseline +7.6%, expanded model +36.4%

nodes.label: ROC_AUC
nodes.description: Backtest AUC: baseline 0.7035, expanded 0.7197
